docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO DEC-13-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-14-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-08-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF GREIGG ANGUS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAGGIE LOPEZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND CAME TO A SETTLEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE SCHEDULED, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES FROM PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT.
